blog.name: Docebo APIs and Webhooks Blog
blog.description: Blog posts from Docebo covering API and webhook integrations for the learning management system platform.

posts.title: Webhook (HTTP)
posts.description: Explains Docebo's webhook functionality, which allows triggers once an event occurs in Docebo, sending information about that event to a specific payload URL. Covers data collection for reports, integrations, and dashboards including HCM system connections and content management updates.

documentation.title: Docebo API General Information
documentation.description: Overview of the Docebo REST API including base URL structure, HTTP methods, data formats, pagination, and rate limiting.

documentation.title: APIs Authentication
documentation.description: Authentication guide covering OAuth 2.0 grant types (Resource Owner Password, Client Credentials, Authorization Code) and JWT Bearer authentication.

documentation.title: Get Started with the Docebo API Browser
documentation.description: Guide to using the interactive API browser built into the Docebo platform at /api-browser/ for testing and reference documentation.

documentation.title: Overview of API Services and Endpoints
documentation.description: Covers all Docebo API services: Learn, Skill, Share, Manage, Notifications, E-commerce, Marketplace, Report, Pages, OTJ, Audittrail, Course, Analytics, Audiences, Poweruser, Learningplan, Enrollment, and Certification.

documentation.title: Creating and Managing Webhooks
documentation.description: Step-by-step guide for setting up webhooks in the Docebo platform.

documentation.title: Webhook Events
documentation.description: Reference of all events that can trigger webhooks in Docebo.

documentation.title: Webhook Error Management
documentation.description: Guide for handling and troubleshooting webhook delivery errors.

documentation.title: Embedded Learning for React Web Applications
documentation.description: Integration guide for embedding Docebo learning components into React applications.

documentation.title: Docebo Connect
documentation.description: Integration platform connecting to 400+ SaaS systems including Google Calendar, Microsoft Entra ID, Amazon S3, HubSpot, Okta, and Workday.

documentation.title: Deprecated and Changed API Calls
documentation.description: Changelog of deprecated and changed Docebo API calls.
